title: Spiking Vision Transformer with Saccadic Attention

problem.main: Vision Transformers demand significant computational and memory resources, restricting deployment in resource-constrained edge vision environments
related: SNNs have energy efficiency advantages but performance gaps compared to ViTs
Existing SNN-based ViT models don't fully leverage SNN energy efficiency
Previous methods don't account for binary spike characteristics of SNNs
Most approaches focus on spatial feature extraction, overlooking temporal dynamics

solution: Design a Saccadic Spike Self-Attention mechanism inspired by biological vision systems that use saccadic mechanisms, focusing on spatio-temporal characteristics of SNNs
